memoryArtifacts.headline: Robert le Strange
memoryArtifacts.description:
BYU Film Number 355556
EGBERT GENEALOGY
Descendants of Egbert Sanderson Collateral Lines A-Z, This genealogy was Collected and organized in 5 volumes by Darrell Dwight Matthews.  Microfilmed May 1963.

zh.Arundel Castle, Sussex, England: 英國素可阿盧德爾 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary FitzAlan於大約1325年出生在英國素可時，她的父親Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel41歲，母親Alice de Warenne39歲。她於1354年之前與John le Strange VII在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1396年8月29日在英國史洛普爾享年72歲。

zh-hans.Arundel Castle, Sussex, England: 英国素可阿盧德爾 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary FitzAlan于大约1325年出生在英国素可时，她的父亲Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel41岁，母亲Alice de Warenne39岁。她于1354年之前与John le Strange VII在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1396年8月29日在英国史洛普爾享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary FitzAlan was born about 1325, in Sussex, England, her father, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, was 41 and her mother, Alice de Warenne, was 39. She married John le Strange VII before 1354, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 29 August 1396, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary FitzAlan est née environ 1325, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice de Warenne, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé John le Strange VII avant 1354, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 29 août 1396, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary FitzAlan um 1325 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel 41 und ihre Mutter Alice de Warenne 39. Sie hat vor 1354 in Shropshire, England John le Strange VII geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. August 1396 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary FitzAlan è nata il circa 1325 nel Sussex, England, sua padre, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Alice de Warenne, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato John le Strange VII prima del 1354, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 agosto 1396, nel Shropshire, England, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary FitzAlanが約1325年にイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundelは41歳，母Alice de Warenneは39歳であった。1354年以前にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでJohn le Strange VIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1396年8月29日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary FitzAlan(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Warenne(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1354년 이전 영국 슈럽실르에서 John le Strange VII(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1396년 8월 29일 영국 슈럽실르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary FitzAlan nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Warenne, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com John le Strange VII antes 1354, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 29 de agosto de 1396, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary FitzAlan родилась около 1325 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Warenne, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John le Strange VII перед 1354 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 29 августа 1396 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary FitzAlan nació aproximadamente 1325, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund FitzAlan 9th Earl of Arundel, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alice de Warenne, tenía 39 años. Se casó con John le Strange VII antes de 1354, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de agosto de 1396, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años.
